tasks.prompt:
检查按模型并行的120样本测试状态：

运行以下检查：
```bash
cd /data1/fanjinyu/ToM/Defense/Defense
echo "=== 测试状态检查 $(date) ==="
echo ""
echo "运行进程数:"
ps aux | grep -E "(run_all_tests_by_model|main_defense.py)" | grep -v grep | wc -l
echo ""
echo "已完成任务:"
wc -l logs/batch_by_model_*/completed.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "0"
echo ""
echo "最近5个完成的任务:"
tail -5 logs/batch_by_model_*/completed.txt 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "失败任务:"
cat logs/batch_by_model_*/failed.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "无失败任务"
echo ""
echo "各模型进度:"
for model in glm4_9b qwen2.5_7b llama3.1_8b; do
    log_file=$(ls logs/batch_by_model_*/${model}_progress.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -f "$log_file" ]; then
        echo "  ${model}:"
        tail -3 "$log_file"
    fi
done
```

以简洁格式报告状态和进度。
